evidence_summary: Establish the transition from active rescue to a state of weary rest. The visual narrative must move from the large-scale movement of the mice exodus to an intimate, high-tension focus on the unconscious lion's face as the group waits for his awakening.

With the Lion safely out of the poppies, the Queen of the Mice promises future assistance before leading her subjects away. The group settles down in the grass, waiting anxiously for the Lion to wake up.
Triumph $\rightarrow$ Quiet Anticipation.
The Lion is positioned safely outside the poppy bed; mice are gathered around him.
The travelers are settled in the grass; the field is quiet; focus shifts to the Lion's face.
The Queen of the Field Mice promises aid and leads her subjects away, leaving the group to wait for the Lion to wake.

shot_notes: The travelers settle down in the grass
evidence_summary: Establish the transition from active rescue to a state of weary rest. The visual narrative must move from the large-scale movement of the mice exodus to an intimate, high-tension focus on the unconscious lion's face as the group waits for his awakening.

With the Lion safely out of the poppies, the Queen of the Mice promises future assistance before leading her subjects away. The group settles down in the grass, waiting anxiously for the Lion to wake up.
Triumph $\rightarrow$ Quiet Anticipation.
The Lion is positioned safely outside the poppy bed; mice are gathered around him.
The travelers are settled in the grass; the field is quiet; focus shifts to the Lion's face.
The Queen of the Field Mice promises aid and leads her subjects away, leaving the group to wait for the Lion to wake.
